title: A monitoring apparatus and method for use in a gas scavenging system
abstract: A monitoring apparatus for a gas scavenging system, comprises a sensor arranged to detect flow of gas in an air brake for a gas scavenging system, and circuitry arranged to determine whether the gas flow is appropriate. The monitoring apparatus can issue an alarm if the gas flow is not appropriate.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A monitoring apparatus for a gas scavenging system, comprising a sensor arranged to detect flow of gas in an air brake for a gas scavenging system, and circuitry arranged to determine whether the gas flow is appropriate and to issue an alarm if the gas flow is not appropriate. 2. An apparatus in accordance with Claim 1, wherein the sensor is a differential pressure sensor and determination of whether the gas flow is appropriate is based on comparison of the measured pressure differential with assessment criteria for normal operation and one or more fault conditions . 3. An apparatus in accordance with Claim 1 or 2 , wherein the circuitry is arranged to determine whether there is any gas flow, and the apparatus comprises an indicator arranged to provide an indication if there is gas flow. 4. An apparatus in accordance with any one of the preceding claims, wherein the circuitry is arranged to determine gas flow direction in the air brake. 5. An apparatus in accordance with Claim 4, wherein th> circuitry is arranged to cause an alarm if the gas flow direction is incorrect. 6. An apparatus in accordance with any one of the preceding Claims, comprising a power source, the circuitry being arranged to enter a hibernation mode when the device is not operating, in order to reduce power drain. 7. An apparatus in accordance with any one of the preceding Claims, further comprising a housing mounting the sensor and circuitry, the housing being arranged to be mounted to an air brake. 8. An apparatus in accordance with Claim 7, wherein the housing is in the form of a cap arranged to fit over an air brake housing. 9. An air brake for a gas scavenging system, the air brake comprising a monitoring apparatus in accordance with any one of Claims 1 to 8. 10. An air brake for gas scavenging system, comprising a first inlet for receiving waste gas, an outlet for receiving suction, and a second inlet for receiving ambient gas, the outlet being positioned between the first inlet and second inlet in relation to the flow of gases when operating. 11. A method of operating an air brake for a gas scavenging system, the air brake comprising a housing having a first opening, a second opening and a third opening, the method comprising the steps of operating the air brake so that the first opening is arranged to receive ambient air, the second opening, between the first opening and the third opening, is operated to act as an outlet connected to a source of suction, and the third opening is operated to receive waste gases.
